title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Axe India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Axe India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Digital Marketing Manager with drive and ambition, Axe India in Noida is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Axe India:
Axe India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Axe India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
